center.name: 德拉旺群島
center.summary: 德拉旺群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括苔巢金丝燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern Borneo, the Natuna and the Derawan Islands and Nias island off western Sumatra

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in northern Borneo, the Natuna and the Derawan Islands and Nias island off western Sumatra
